title: Furry Necromancer
desc: You died, but I got good news and bad news for you. The good news - you have been resurrected, the bad news - you have been resurrected by a necromancer who has some "special" plans for you (although it might not be "bad news" at all...)

title: The Adventures of Sir Kicksalot
desc: A first-person action game that provides various ways for defeating your foes, whether through weaponry, magic, stealth, or clever tactics like kicking into deadly spikes.

title: Gold Gold Adventure Gold
desc: Gold makes god. Embrace city-building chaos. Pet giant monsters! Watch puny adventurers! Bend nature to your will with powerful spells and the greatest of all forces of nature - GOLD. Colony sim / reverse RPG

title: Shattered Divinities
desc: In Shattered Divinities, embark on an adventure that pits you directly against divinity itself! An ancient War of Gods shattered the world, and their broken power has become the Calamities that consume all life. How will you survive in this land? And how will you uncover the secrets behind the War?

title: The Sintonia Chronicles
desc: Join Maria on an unforgettable journey through the world of Sintonia to rescue her beloved pups. Forge unlikely alliances, face epic bosses, and outsmart every challenge in a universe brimming with magic and adventure.

title: The Island of Doctor Morose
desc: A horror adventure game inspired by the art of Theodor Geisel and the works of HP Lovecraft, featuring a mixture of point and click and survival horror elements.

title: Down with the Ship
desc: Strategic auto battler where you design a heavily-armed spaceship. Draft 200+ items, outfit your hull, and unleash it in async PvP. Blend captains and factions for absurd combos and galactic domination. Roll, buy, place, pray.

title: Augment Anthem
desc: A 2D sci-fi metroidvania. Explore Bunker 7, fight biomechanical threats shaped by corrupted superintelligence, and rebuild Haven, humanity's final refuge.

title: Boogie Fungi
desc: Build and maintain a colony of Mushrooms, keep them happy with constant parties and make sure to deploy some defenses to deal with foragers

title: Pandora's Toybox
desc: Pandora's Toybox combines god simulation and Roguelike elements. Players guide humanity from settlements to city-states, shaping a faith-driven civilization. As Epimetheus, use divine powers to combat heretical beliefs and build a thriving, devout society in a randomly generated, chaotic world.

title: Cat Island Petrichor
desc: "Cat Island Petricolor" is an exploration adventure game set on Japan's summer "Cat Island." Become a cat, explore the island, and uncover the mysteries of Cat Island together with the heroine!

title: Closure
desc: An experimental narrative game that tells its story through sound and memory. Sort through a box of personal momentos and relive memories from a seven-year relationship by closing you eyes in real life.

title: Steel Artery: Train City Builder
desc: Build a living city on rails in this steampunk fantasy train-city builder. Manage multiracial colonies with thousands of autonomous citizens, balance their needs, manage the economy, and create logistics as you explore distant regions to ensure the prosperity of your Empire.

title: Deathplane
desc: Deathplane is a 2D puzzle-platformer game about moving the actual deathplane below the level up and down to kill enemies and find solutions and secrets.

title: SubZero
desc: A frozen apocalypse. Three unique survivors join you. Lead them through the icy wasteland! Zombie whispers, blizzards blur morality... Hope or doom? The fateful die burns in your grip.

title: Halls of Nyarlathotep
desc: Explore the shifting labyrinths of the Dreamlands in this Lovecraftian roguelite FPS, where every shot, step, and secret chips away at your sanity as you face eldritch horrors and ancient Outer Gods.

title: Service Area Simulator
desc: Your adventure begins: from a humble roadside pit stop to a massive Route 66 rest area! Clean, stock market shelves, and keep toilets spotless to avoid bankruptcy. Restaurant, market, restrooms, and classic American diner await you!

title: Deliria
desc: Fight, build, and conquer wonders in a thrilling infinite 3D sandbox. An adventure without cubes! Play solo or with friends in PvP, co-op, or creative mode—backed by 20+ original soundtracks.

title: Pawbay
desc: Take part in the most coziest cat adventure! Explore a lively open-world town through the eyes of a mischievous cat. Create chaos, discover secrets, and turn everyday life in Pawbay upside down.

title: Futa Fucks Femboys
desc: Futa Fucks Femboys is an explosive mix of 2D Visual Novel and Collectible Card Game, where an alien symbiote turns the main hero into a FUTANARI and drags her into an adventure full of passion, absurdity, and FEMBOYS. Saving Earth has never felt so spicy

title: Midnight Kebab
desc: We start working as a chef in a kebab shop where employees constantly quit or mysteriously disappear. As we work, we begin to understand the disturbing reason why people become obsessively dependent only inside the restaurant.

title: Drive Together
desc: One car, many drivers! Team up with your friends and share control of the gas, brakes, and steering to reach the finish line through chaotic tracks. Will it be perfect teamwork, or a total disaster? (Playable with 1–4 players)

title: Boba Buba
desc: BobaBuba Is the Boba Bubble-Pop Puzzle Adventure with story mode featuring cute beverages and an endless mode for huge replay value. With global leaderboards from launch!

title: Pintorino
desc: Ready to challenge your brain? Pintorino is a grid-based puzzle game where you guide a player across the board, aiming to pass through all the required blocks - each with its own unique purpose.

title: Forza Horizon 6: Premium Edition
desc: Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition includes the full game with Early Access - Play 4 days early starting May 15, and VIP Membership, Welcome Pack, Time Attack Car Pack, and Car Pass (30 cars delivered to your game, one per week), as well as the Italian Passion Car Pack and two Premium Expansions coming post-launch.

title: Galaxy Grinder Incremental
desc: Galaxy Grinder is a fast-paced incremental game where you destroy planets and asteroids with your cursor and weapons. Earn resources, unlock new worlds, and grow stronger through upgrades, skills, and power-ups between runs.

title: Platyguard: Swarm Slayer
desc: PlatyGuard: Swarm Slayer is a 2D action roguelike platformer RPG set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, infused with biopunk and dark sci-fi flair. Survive the chaos, clash with mutant foes, and explore mysterious sites in this indie adventure!

title: Mewlin the Clicker
desc: Click to roll the crystal ball across the table, dodging obstacles and facing bosses while building a deck of cards that completely changes your strategy with every run. Help Mewlin, a very curious orange cat, make a total mess in this magical clicker with deckbuilding elements.

title: The Curse of Womanland
desc: A romance-adventure text-based game themed around the Land of Women. You will travel to the Land of Women, meet the mysterious young lady Jian Ling, and gradually uncover the bloody and dark secrets behind this realm. Death, resistance, or degeneration? Everything depends on your choices.

title: Centipede Simulator
desc: Experience life as a centipede! Munch on crickets to grow longer and evade deadly predators in a frantic struggle for survival across multiple game modes. How long can you last?

title: Nano Squadron
desc: Nano Squadron is a top-down space roguelite where your nanobot ship evolves mid-battle. Survive relentless alien waves, stack powerful upgrades, and build a ship capable of defending Earth.

title: Psychic Kung Fu Master
desc: CRPG gameplay, turn-based combat, collect martial arts to become the leader of the martial world, recruit disciples, cultivate martial skills, and compete for supremacy in the world.

title: Overdrive Reloaded
desc: Overdrive Reloaded is a single player first-person shooter created by Dynamite Games. Drop into a stunning reimagining of the series, built from the ground up with relentless PvE combat, action-packed Arena modes, open world Battle Royale, and an all-new progression system known as Evolution.

title: Entiled
desc: Entiled is a spatial tile-clearing puzzle game where every move matters. Remove tiles without collisions, match the active color to build your multiplier, and trigger chain reactions to maximize your score in quick, replayable runs.

title: Ace Thunder: Aircraft Wingman Simulator
desc: Precision in flight. Power in combat.

title: Sky Meadow
desc: Drift into a peaceful world above the clouds.

title: Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection
desc:
Hold onto your diapers! Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection brings together the ultimate collection of Tommy, Chuckie, Phil, Lil, and Angelica’s greatest hits. Curated for fans by the team at Limited Run Games, this nostalgic bundle restores six iconic adventures from the Golden Age of Reptar, now enhanced for modern play.

Whether you're exploring the Pickles' backyard or trekking through EuroReptarland, this is the definitive way to experience the games that defined a generation of Nicktoons fans.

title: Little Helper Cafe: Sugar Cubes
desc: Small Deliveries, Big Smiles

title: Spy Guy Memory Abstraction Bundle
desc: No description available

title: Mogitate: Bearing Fruit
desc: You're a spirited young man, ready to make the most of a new start! Meet the colorful cast of townsfolk and live your life to the fullest while making friends with all of the people around you!

title: Blueblood Arena
desc: An indie fighting game with simple controls and anthropomorphic characters. Developed by the same dev as Among Us Arena.

title: Skyforge Trails
desc: Forge your path above the clouds.

title: Cook the Word
desc: No description available

title: Unanswered
desc: Unanswered is a first-person psychological horror experience where observation and resource management are your only way out. Trapped in an environment that distorts your memories, you must explore every corner looking for vital tools to progress. Use a flashlight to pierce the darkness of the hallways, and switch to your UV flashlight to reveal invisible clues, hidden trails, and messages that the human eye cannot perceive on its own.
